title: Medical Freedom Maps — Access Cell
description: One record per (jurisdiction, layer, dimension). CI-validated, PR-based contribution. See jurisdictional-access-maps-spec §1.

jurisdiction.description: ISO 3166-2 code for subnational (e.g. US-MT) or ISO 3166-1 for national tier

value.description: Dimension value — type must match layer-registry dimension definition

citation.description: Legal citation or source reference (statute, regulation, agency guidance)

source_id.description: Must resolve to an entry in data/sources.yaml

source_type.description: Provenance classification. primary_statute only if statute was read directly.

verified_on.description: Date this value was last verified against its source

verified_by.description: GitHub handle or identity of verifier

confidence.description: high = primary source read directly; medium = secondary tracker trusted; derived = inferred from related data

note.description: Optional context about this dimension value
